channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Utah Jazz guard Trey Alexander stretchered off court in NBA Summer League
item.description: Alexander, who signed a two-way deal with the Jazz last week. was injured in game against Chicago Bulls.

item.title: What is Iran’s Pickaxe Mountain, the mystery site Trump warns he’ll attack?
item.description: Tensions escalate as the US president threatens to destroy Iran's fortified nuclear site in the south of Tehran.

item.title: Argentina war vets urge focus on football for England World Cup semifinal
item.description: One of sport's great rivalries sees Argentina face England in an ever feisty encounter in the 2026 edition's semifinal.

item.title: ICE kills 26-year-old in Maine: What happened, and who else has ICE killed?
item.description: More than 60 people have died in ICE shootings or while in detention since Donald Trump returned to power.

item.title: Emir of Qatar receives condolences on the death of the Father Emir
item.description: Condolences from several government leaders, who expressed their sincere sympathy to Qatar, its leadership and people.

item.title: FIFA World Cup brackets: Semifinal schedule, France vs Spain prediction
item.description: France face Spain in the first World Cup semifinal, as Argentina prepare to renew their rivalry with England.

item.title: US bombs Iran again, Tehran strikes Gulf, tankers: What’s the latest?
item.description: While Trump has threatened to hit targets in Iran including Pickaxe Mountain, he has said a deal is possible.

item.title: Photos: Wildfires ravage historic forest near Paris
item.description: Wildfires near Paris scorch 1,300 hectares as France endures its third heatwave in three months.

item.title: ‘Country grows, we grow too’: 1 million migrants seek legal status in Spain
item.description: The government expected half a million people to apply, but nearly double that number came forward.

item.title: US military releases video of its latest strikes on Iran
item.description: US Central Command has released video showing its latest wave of attacks reportedly hitting Iran's mainland and islands.

item.title: Watch FIFA World Cup: Mbappe vs Yamal headlines Spain-France semifinal
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: Who will win the 2026 FIFA World Cup? Here’s what AI predicts
item.description: Al Jazeera put nine leading AI models to the test to predict the 2026 FIFA Men's World Cup champion.

item.title: Bangkok bar fire death toll rises to 30 as police probe possible negligence
item.description: Thailand authorities say that 24 people remain in critical condition in hospital after the blaze at a pub.

item.title: With US-Iran trust broken again, can Pakistan bring them back to talks?
item.description: Islamabad is still urging dialogue, but analysts say it has few tools to halt the latest round of US-Iran escalation.

item.title: Why is India blocking film on a man who counted Punjab insurgency killings?
item.description: Satluj, based on life and murder of rights activist Jaswant Singh Khalra, is still finding its audience despite the ban.

item.title: Trump threatens to attack ‘Pickaxe Mountain’ a nuclear facility inside Iran
item.description: US President Donald Trump is threatening to attack a heavily-fortified underground nuclear facility in Iran

item.title: ‘Beijing is laughing’ at US-Mexico-Canada stalled trade talks
item.description: A US trade expert says the US, Mexico, and Canada need to hold trilateral talks to get a cross-border trade deal signed.

item.title: Birthday present for Spain’s Yamal? World Cup semifinal win over France
item.description: Yamal wants to celebrate his 19th birthday by taking Spain to the World Cup final in New York.

item.title: Mexico’s Sheinbaum announces criminal charges request in US over ICE deaths
item.description: Mexico to formally ask prosecutors to file cases in US courts over its citizens' deaths in immigration operations.

item.title: Houthis: Saudi airport targeted in retaliation for strikes on Sanaa airport
item.description: Yemen's Houthis say they struck Saudi Arabia's Abha airport in retaliation for a strike on Sanaa’s international airport

item.title: Brazil court bars Bolsonaro’s son from visiting ex-president for 90 days
item.description: Top court bars former President Jair Bolsonaro's son from visiting his father under house arrest over social media post.

item.title: ‘Kylian is fine’: France ready, full-strength for Spain World Cup semifinal
item.description: French coach Deschamps says his team will be fully prepared for a midfield battle against the European champions.

item.title: Oil prices hit 1-month high as US-Iran attacks dim Strait of Hormuz outlook
item.description: Brent crude nears $85 a barrel amid renewed hostilities between Washington and Tehran.

item.title: ICE officer kills motorist in Maine; the second fatality in a week
item.description: An Immigration and Customs Enforcement officer has fatally shot a motorist in Maine.

item.title: Hungary’s parliament votes to oust president in latest anti-Orban move
item.description: Hungarian parliament passes amendment that would remove President Sulyok, appointed under ex-Prime Minister Orban.
